title: Our Team
headline: Meet the Team Behind Tolemi
subheadline: Passionate people building the future of civic technology.

members.name: Alex Chen
members.title: CEO & Co-Founder
members.bio: Alex brings over a decade of experience in civic technology and urban planning. Previously led product at a major GovTech firm.

members.name: Maria Gonzalez
members.title: CTO & Co-Founder
members.bio: Maria is a full-stack engineer with deep expertise in geospatial systems and data infrastructure for local governments.

members.name: James Okafor
members.title: VP of Product
members.bio: James has spent his career at the intersection of design and public policy, ensuring Tolemi's products serve real community needs.

members.name: Sarah Kim
members.title: Head of Engineering
members.bio: Sarah leads our engineering team with a focus on scalable, reliable systems that cities can depend on every day.

members.name: David Reeves
members.title: Head of Sales
members.bio: David works directly with city leaders to understand their challenges and match them with the right Tolemi solutions.

members.name: Priya Patel
members.title: Head of Customer Success
members.bio: Priya ensures every Tolemi client gets maximum value, from onboarding through long-term partnership.
